{{Quote|History may question my motives, but their accusations do not concern me….It is for honor and justice that we fight.|Savax|<ref name="Shadows of the Empire Sourcebook">''[[Shadows of the Empire Sourcebook]]''</ref>}}
'''Savax [[Clan-Vorsazg]]''', [[War-Master]] of the [[Southern Wastes]], was the [[Ubese/Legends|Ubese]] clan leader who led a coalition of "True" Ubese clans from [[Uba IV/Legends|Uba IV]] against the "''yrak pootzck''" Ubese of [[Ubertica]].

Savax's campaign was motivated by jealousy and vengeance. He saw the people of Ubertica as living in luxury under [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republican]] and later [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] overlords, while the Ubese on their original homeworld had struggled to survive since the [[bombardment of the Uba system]] over one thousand years ago. Savax considered the destruction of Ubertica, and the deaths of all of its people, necessary for the "True" Ubese to escape the curse of history and take back their true place in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

In the [[strike against Ubertica]], Savax's forces consisted of five [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]], crewed by a coalition of several of Uba IV's clans. It is rumored that these ships were supplied by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]]. Though his forces were easily able to lay waste to many of Ubertica's cities, all five ships were vaporized by the Imperial forces which intervened. A [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] written by Savax, where he laid out his justifications for his genocidal acts, was found among the wreckage of his fleet.
